entity_data.ocr_text:
Até 30 de abril

Todo dia tem opções deliciosas com preço especial.

Prato do Chef R$ 70
entity_data.img_caption:
The image is an advertisement for a restaurant, specifically Almeida Junior, promoting a special offer. The background is a light beige color with a decorative plate featuring sushi and a salad at the top left corner. The sushi consists of several pieces of sushi rolls with orange fish (likely salmon) and white rice, arranged neatly on a plate with a red floral design.

The main text in the center of the image reads "Até 30 de abril," which translates to "Until April 30th." Below this, there is a statement in Portuguese: "Todo dia tem opções deliciosas com preço especial," meaning "Every day has delicious options with special prices."

At the bottom of the image, there are two sections with different colors:
1. A pink section with the text "Prato do Chef" (Chef's Dish).
2. A black section with the price "$70" (indicating the cost of the Chef's Dish).

The overall design is clean and visually appealing, focusing on the promotion of the special offer until April 30th.

The image is an advertisement for "Circuito Gastronômico" at Balneário Shopping, as indicated by the text at the top of the image. The background is a soft, light pink color.

At the center of the image, there is a circular plate divided into four sections, each containing different types of food:

1. **Top Left Section**: Contains a serving of French fries.
2. **Top Right Section**: Features slices of sushi, including pieces of salmon and other ingredients wrapped in seaweed.
3. **Bottom Left Section**: Displays a piece of grilled steak with visible grill marks.
4. **Bottom Right Section**: Contains a salad with leafy greens, cherry tomatoes, and possibly some dressing or sauce.

The text "CIRCUITO GASTRONÔMICO" is prominently displayed in large, bold letters at the top of the image, with "BALNEÁRIO Shopping" written below it in a smaller font. The overall design is clean and visually appealing, highlighting the variety of food options available at the shopping center.

entity_data.ocr_text:
Budha SPA
Que tal um tempinho para relaxar?
entity_data.img_caption:
The image depicts a serene and relaxing spa setting. A woman is lying on a massage table, receiving a back massage from another woman who is kneeling beside her. The woman giving the massage is wearing a white uniform with an embroidered logo on the chest, indicating she is a professional masseuse at Budha SPA.

The environment is warm and inviting, with soft lighting that creates a cozy atmosphere. In the background, there is a large potted plant adorned with string lights, adding to the tranquil ambiance. The room appears to be part of a spa or wellness center, with a wooden table and some decorative items visible in the background.

The text overlay on the image reads "Budha SPA" and "Que tal um tempinho para relaxar?" which translates to "What about a little time to relax?" in English. This suggests that the image is promoting the spa services offered by Budha SPA, encouraging customers to take a break and unwind.

PIZZA SI MANGI
COZINHA ITALIANA DIVERTIDA

```
entity_data.img_caption:
The image showcases a plate of food, likely from a restaurant or café named "Duladu." The dish appears to be a classic Carbonara pasta, garnished with a creamy sauce, possibly made with eggs and cheese. The pasta is topped with small pieces of bacon and a single egg yolk, which is cracked open and slightly runny, adding a rich, golden color to the dish. There are also some fresh herbs sprinkled on top, enhancing the visual appeal.

In the background, there is another plate with a similar design, featuring the same red and green border and the name "Duladu" written on it. This suggests that the setting is consistent with the restaurant's branding. Additionally, there is a dessert visible in the bottom right corner of the image, which includes a slice of chocolate cake topped with whipped cream and a strawberry, indicating that the restaurant offers a variety of dishes beyond just pasta.

The text overlay on the image reads "Se delicie com o clássico Carbonara," which translates to "Savor the classic Carbonara," inviting customers to enjoy the traditional Italian dish. The overall presentation is appetizing and suggests a focus on high-quality, authentic Italian cuisine.

entity_data.ocr_text: No Balneário Shopping, você encontra o refúgio perfeito para dias de descanso, boa gastronomia e momentos só seus
entity_data.img_caption:
The image depicts the exterior of the Balneário Shopping mall at dusk or early evening. The sky is transitioning from day to night, with hues of orange and purple blending into the darker blue of the evening sky. The mall's facade is illuminated, highlighting its modern architectural design.

In the foreground, there are palm trees and well-maintained greenery, adding a tropical feel to the scene. The street in front of the mall is relatively empty, with a few cars parked along the side. The entrance to the mall features a large sign that reads "Balneário Shopping" in white letters against a dark background. The sign is mounted on a modern, sleek structure that complements the overall aesthetic of the shopping center.

A text overlay in Portuguese is present in the bottom part of the image, which translates to: "No Balneário Shopping, você encontra o refúgio perfeito para dias de descanso, boa gastronomia e momentos só seus." This translates to: "At Balneário Shopping, you find the perfect retreat for rest days, good food, and moments just for you."

The overall atmosphere of the image suggests a serene and inviting environment, ideal for relaxation and enjoying a variety of amenities within the shopping center.

entity_data.ocr_text:
Mantegaria do porto
Experimente o Pastel de Nata
entity_data.img_caption:
The image features a plate of three small, round, golden-brown pastries with a smooth, shiny surface, likely made from egg custard. These pastries are placed on a white plate, which is set on a wooden table. In the background, there is a white cup filled with a frothy beverage, possibly cappuccino or latte, and a saucer. The cup has a red triangle logo on it, which might be associated with a specific brand or establishment.

To the left of the cup, there is a decorative rooster figurine, which is colorful and intricately designed, featuring patterns and a heart symbol on its body. This rooster is likely a traditional Portuguese decoration, often used to celebrate special occasions such as Easter.

The text overlay on the image reads "Mantegaria do porto" and "Experimente o Pastel de Nata," which translates to "Portuguese butter" and "Try the Pasteis de Nata," respectively. Pasteis de Nata are a popular Portuguese dessert, typically served during the Easter season. They are small, flaky pastry shells filled with a sweet, creamy custard mixture.

Overall, the image promotes the enjoyment of Portuguese cuisine, specifically highlighting the taste of Pasteis de Nata, a beloved dessert that is often enjoyed with a cup of coffee or tea.

The image features a delectable pastry, specifically a New York Roll from Café Cultura. The pastry is placed on a white paper napkin, which is resting on a wooden cutting board. The New York Roll has a distinctive spiral pattern, with alternating layers of light and dark brown dough, creating a visually appealing texture. The top of the roll is generously topped with a smooth, creamy white frosting, which appears to be a vanilla or cream cheese frosting. The background is softly blurred, showcasing a natural setting with green foliage, suggesting that the photo was taken in an outdoor or well-lit indoor environment. The overall presentation of the pastry is elegant and appetizing, highlighting the craftsmanship and quality of the Café Cultura New York Roll.

The image shows a person's hand holding the handle of a shower door, which is partially open. The background reveals a bathroom setting with several items visible. On the left side, there is a small table with a few objects on it, including what appears to be a bottle and a white cylindrical object. Behind the table, there is a large green plant with broad leaves, adding a touch of nature to the space. The right side of the image shows a wooden cabinet or shelf. The text "Relax time" and "Seu feriado off" is overlaid on the image, suggesting a theme of relaxation and perhaps a break from work or daily routines. The overall atmosphere of the image conveys a sense of calm and leisure.

The image features a vibrant and colorful scene centered around tea. The background is a solid, bright yellow color, which creates a cheerful and inviting atmosphere. At the center of the image, there is a clear glass container with a lid, containing a tea bag labeled "TEA." The tea bag is partially submerged in a glass filled with a pinkish-red liquid, likely iced tea, which is poured into the container. The glass is placed on an orange cube, which is itself on top of a smaller pink cube. The text "Tea Shop" is prominently displayed in the middle of the image, with the phrase "É hora do chá" (It's time for tea) below it, both written in Portuguese. The overall composition is clean and modern, with a focus on the tea-making process and the refreshing beverage.

entity_data.publication_caption: Nem todo mundo quer cair na folia, né? 🎭  Se você faz parte do time que prefere relaxar, temos as opções ideais para um carnaval off. De uma massagem revigorante no Buddha Spa a uma pausa para um chá na Tea Shop, passando por um bom filme no GNC Cinemas ou um doce irresistível na Manteigaria do Porto… Aqui, você encontra o refúgio perfeito para curtir o feriado no seu ritmo. 🧘‍♀️✨ Qual será a sua escolha para um feriado mais relax? 💆‍♂️

🧘‍♀️✨ O equilíbrio perfeito existe ✨🍷 A prática do yoga é nosso portal para o autoconhecimento e equilíbrio - onde corpo e mente finalmente se encontram em harmonia profunda.  É aqui que transcendemos limites físicos, descobrimos nossa paz interior e despertamos a energia vital que nos guia para uma vida MUITO mais plena e consciente. 🌿 E quem disse que o autocuidado não pode ter dois momentos perfeitos? 👇 🧘‍♀️ PRIMEIRO: Uma prática de yoga revigorante com as amigas 🍷 DEPOIS: Uma noite de vinhos e risadas sem culpa O segredo para esse dia perfeito? Novvo Pré-Drink! 3 cápsulas no primeiro gole = despertar renovada amanhã para mais yoga! O equilíbrio que você merece. 💊✨ Quem aí também pratica esse ritual de bem-estar? Marca suas amigas zen que merecem conhecer esse equilíbrio entre meditação e celebração! 👇 #YogaEVinho #EquilíbrioPerfeito #AcordeNovvo #AutocuidadoCompleto #YogaPratica #VidaEquilibrada #BemEstarHolístico #MeditaçãoECelebração #PreDrink #YogaLifestyle

Clima de sabores no ar!  Começou o Circuito Gastronômico do Balneário Shopping com opções incríveis para todos os gostos e com valor fixo de R$70,00.  Aproveite até 30 de abril nos restaurantes participantes: Unizushi, Madero, Outback, Las Lenas e Pecorino. Venha viver essa experiência deliciosa! *Confira os pratos disponíveis nos restaurantes participantes. *Válido para almoço e jantar.

Quinta-feira pede um Happy Hour à altura! 🍹🎶 Vem curtir uma noite especial com música ao vivo, double drink nos restaurantes participantes e aquela vibe perfeita para relaxar e aproveitar. ✨ 📍 Onde? Piso L1, pertinho do Unizushi e Duladu. 🕕 Quando? Quinta-feira, a partir das 19h! Chama a galera, marca na agenda e vem brindar com a gente! 🍸🎤  Para mais informações, consulte os restaurantes. @unizushisc é @duladududu

Yoga, amor e a chance de um lar! 🐶🧘‍♀️💛 Nosso Puppy Yoga foi muito mais do que uma aula – foi um momento de conexão, bem-estar e, principalmente, esperança para os filhotes resgatados pela @ongvivabichobc . ✨ Comandada pela incrível @jo.mansardo , a prática aconteceu em meio a muita fofura, carinho e energia positiva. E para deixar a experiência ainda mais especial, tivemos o apoio da @livebalnearioshopping , um café da manhã delicioso da @growfitgourmet e, claro, um mimo cheio de sabor para os pets da @ninospetoficial  Se você se apaixonou por esses aumigos, que tal transformar essa conexão em um lar para sempre? A adoção responsável pode mudar vidas – a deles e a sua!

Ontem, o Balneário Shopping recebeu o Icônico Pedro Mafra e suas convidadas para um evento especial em celebração à nova coleção Origens da Paula Torres, uma marca de sapatos exclusivos e feitos à mão. O encontro começou com um almoço impecável no restaurante italiano Duladu, seguido de um coquetel na loja, onde as convidadas puderam conhecer de perto cada detalhe da coleção ao lado da própria fundadora, Ana Paula Torres. Para tornar o momento ainda mais memorável, as convidadas foram presenteadas com as pulseiras exclusivas da marca e personalizadas com as suas iniciais A Paula Torres está no piso L1 do Balneário Shopping. Venha descobrir a coleção Origens e viver essa experiência única. ✨💫

O BFS – Balneário Fashion Show está de volta com a edição Best Winter no Balneário Shopping, nos dias 07 e 08 de maio. Dois dias de desfiles, tendências e encontros com quem faz a moda acontecer em SC. Convites disponíveis nas marcas participantes. Nos vemos na passarela? #BFS2025 #BestWinter #BalnearioFashionShow #ModaComEstilo #BalnearioShopping #BFS2025 #BalnearioFashionShow #BestWinter #ModaSC #BalnearioShopping #OneSpotPromo

Uma pele melhor e mais saudável começa aqui! ✨ A linha Fenty Skin chegou para transformar sua rotina de cuidados! 💜  Com fórmulas inovadoras e ingredientes poderosos, esses produtos elevam o skincare a outro nível. Hidratação, luminosidade e aquele glow impecável – tudo o que sua pele merece! ✨💆‍♀️ 📍 Encontre a linha completa na Sephora, Piso L2 e descubra o segredo para uma pele radiante.

Essa semana foi dia de experimentar o Circuito Gastronômico do Balneário Shopping.  São vários restaurantes participando com pratos de R$70,00 no almoço e na janta. E aí, em qual vocês vão primeiro?  Corre que é até dia 30 de Abril
